query:
-- Add missing columns to reviews table if they don't exist
ALTER TABLE `reviews` 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `reviewerId` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `revieweeId` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `reviewerType` enum('student','coach') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'student',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `isVisible` boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `visibleAt` timestamp;

-- Add missing cancellation columns to lessons table if they don't exist
ALTER TABLE `lessons`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cancelledAt` timestamp,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cancelledBy` enum('student','coach','admin'),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cancellationReason` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `refundAmountCents` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `refundPercentage` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cancellationToken` varchar(64);

ALTER TABLE `reviews` 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `reviewerId` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `revieweeId` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `reviewerType` enum('student','coach') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'student',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `isVisible` boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `visibleAt` timestamp;

-- Add missing cancellation columns to lessons table if they don't exist
ALTER TABLE `lessons`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cancelledAt` timestamp,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cancelledBy` enum('student','coach','admin'),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cancellationReason` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `refundAmountCents` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `refundPercentage` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cancellationToken` varchar(64);
